verses.1: The fool has said in his heart, “There is no God.”
verses.2: God looks down from heaven on the children of men,
verses.3: Every one of them has gone back.
verses.4: Have the workers of iniquity no knowledge,
verses.5: There they were in great fear, where no fear was,
verses.6: Oh that the salvation of Israel would come out of Zion!
